education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: Final Year Project - AI-Powered Job Recommendation System
projects.description: Contributed to a job recommendation website built with the MERN stack. Designed and implemented the AI/ML pipeline using large language models and vector search. Encoded user profiles using Sentence Transformer (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and stored them in FAISS with real-time MongoDB integration. Developed a hybrid recommendation algorithm combining TF-IDF and Doc2Vec for improved job-candidate matching. Built an AI-powered resume analyzer using the Google Gemini API, applying prompt engineering to extract key candidate insights.

projects.name: Google Gemini Integration
projects.description: Created a web-based conversational AI assistant using React and the Google Gemini API. Designed a user interface similar to Google Gemini for chat-based interactions.
